subcodes.title: Words to Lua Getsinger
subcodes.first_line: Ios was a shepherd boy who tended his flocks in the valleys and on the sloping hills of Persia. He was poor and simple
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @stories; anecdotes
